business.name: AJ’S COLUMBUS HANDYMAN, LLC
business.tagline: The guy your neighbors call first

hero.headline: Fix it right, *price it fair* — that's the AJ way
hero.subheadline: From flooring to fencing, trimming to troubleshooting. One call handles it all in Columbus.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: What AJ Fixes
services_section.subheading: Every project gets the same attention — whether it's one loose board or a full deck rebuild

services.title: Flooring Installation
services.description: Hardwood, laminate, tile — we measure twice, install once, and clean up completely when done.

services.title: Fencing & Gates
services.description: Custom gates, deck railings, property lines. Built to last Ohio weather and your budget.

services.title: Tree Trimming
services.description: Keep your yard looking sharp and your gutters clear. We haul away every branch.

services.title: General Repairs
services.description: That list of little things? Knock them all out in one visit. Drywall, trim, fixtures, you name it.

services.title: Lawn & Landscape Care
services.description: Regular maintenance that keeps your property looking its best, season after season.

about.heading: The Columbus Handyman Who Shows Up
about.body: AJ has been fixing, building, and maintaining homes across Columbus and Gahanna for years. What sets us apart? We actually communicate. We show up when we say we will. We price things fairly upfront. And we don't leave until the job's done right. It's really that simple.

reviews.name: Amy H.
reviews.text: Two years running, AJ's been punctual and thorough on our lawn care. Outstanding results every time.

reviews.name: Phyllis D.
reviews.text: Flooring, tree trimming, deck gates — AJ handled multiple projects beautifully. Great pricing and communication.

reviews.name: Rewar M.
reviews.text: Best service in a long time. Very communicative, respectful, and got everything done neatly.

reviews.name: Brooke B.
reviews.text: Detail oriented with fair, transparent pricing. My landscape always looks fantastic.

cta.heading: Ready to Cross Things Off Your List?
cta.body: Call AJ today. Fair pricing, clear communication, and work that's done right the first time.
